case_title: BAILEY, HOUSTON SYLVESTER VS DENNE, QUNTOSHA

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDNECE FROM THE CREDITOR REQUESTING TO WAIVE THE FOUR MONTHS WAIT AND TO ISSUE A BENCH LETTER.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2003, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA
PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX FILED.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2003, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM AUG-04-2003 TO DEC-11-2003 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA
ORDER TO ISSUE A BENCH LETTER WITH A HEARING DATE OF DEC. 11, 2003 AT 11:00 AM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAILEY, HOUSTON SYLVESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA $150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-2003 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT RECEIVED THREE (3) WORKING DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. AS THE JUDGMNT DEBTOR DID NOT APPEAR, THE OEX WAS TAKEN OFF
CALENDAR FOR 4 MONTHS PER LOCAL RULES OF COURT #8.15C. CREDITOR GIVEN COPY OF INSTRUCTIONS TO FOLLOW PER SUCH LOCAL RULES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY BAILEY, HOUSTON SYLVESTER AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-10-2003 AS TO DEFENDANT DENNE, QUNTOSHA
ALTHOUGH THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON AUG. 4, 2003 IT WAS ENTERED AS FILED ON JULY 30, 2003 FOR THE PURPOSE OF ISSUING A BENCH LETTER.
